commit.message:
Add engineering-reasoning AI prompt and near-miss iteration to optimizer

Replace mechanical "widen pinches" instruction with a proper engineering
reasoning framework that teaches the AI:
- How each pinch point controls power output (with ~2°F = 1-3 MW rule of thumb)
- Near-miss iteration strategy: when a config is within ~3 MW of the band,
  propose 2-3 small pinch variations to walk it in
- Novel fluid exploration: don't abandon a fluid after 1-2 tries, reason about
  WHY it produced its output and what change would move it toward the band
- Sensitivity learning: track how each fluid responds to pinch changes
- Cost-power tradeoff: once in-band, push pinches wider to minimize $/kW

Add "Near Misses & Promising Leads" section to AI context that flags configs
within 5 MW of the band edge with specific hints (tighten/widen pinches).

Add IN-BAND/over/under labels to last batch results so AI sees immediately
which configs hit the target band.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix auth: use getSession() instead of getUser() in Server Components

Root cause: getUser() makes a network call to Supabase API on every
request. In Server Components during RSC fetches, this call can fail
intermittently, returning null and triggering signout redirects.

- Replace getUser() with getSession() in getAuthUser() — reads JWT
  from cookies without network call (middleware already validated)
- Add try/catch in getAuthUser() for resilience
- Fix redirectWithCookies: preserve cookie options (httpOnly, secure,
  path, sameSite) when copying to redirect responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Point all service bubbles and footer links to /marketplace

All 10 خدماتنا buttons and footer links now navigate to /marketplace
instead of broken /VAR/marketplace or non-existent pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix data collection: replace dead UJN OpenData with live JN Portal API

procurement_scraper.py:
- Completely rewritten: was broken HTML scraper for dead /pozivi/lista endpoint
- Now uses JN Portal REST API with date range filter (same API as jnportal_scraper)
- Fetches contracts signed in last N days, sorted by ContractDate DESC
- Outputs recent_contracts.json + procurement_institutions.json in JN Portal schema

procurement_bulk_scraper.py:
- Updated OpenData BASE from portal.ujn.gov.rs to jnportal.ujn.gov.rs (old portal fully down)
- Individual year failures already handled gracefully (warns, continues)

graph_loader.py:
- load_procurement_data() updated to handle new array format (recent_contracts.json)
- Reuses _load_jnportal_contract/_load_jnportal_institution for consistency
- Keeps legacy single-file-per-contract support for backwards compat

detection.py (revolving_door):
- Fixed crash on empty string date: date("") raises SyntaxError in Neo4j
- Added e1.until <> '' guard and conditional date() call

Results: 2000 new contracts from last 7 days, 1620 total alerts (was 1275)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Create SPRINGS music machine - spring mesh physics creates polyrhythms

A physics-based music machine where 30 particles connected by springs bounce and trigger notes at peak displacement. The mesh constantly oscillates (hypnotic before audio starts), and when you press START, each bounce creates a note from D minor pentatonic scale. Tap to perturb particles and watch energy propagate through the spring network.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix right-sizing: best-config selection, Pareto, and AI context now respect MW band

Three bugs caused the optimizer to ignore the 53-57 MW max constraint:

1. get_best_adjusted() and get_best_per_kw() selected cheapest config regardless
   of MW band — now prefer in-band configs, fall back only if none exist yet
2. update_pareto_frontier() included all converged configs — now only in-band
   configs participate in the Pareto frontier
3. build_ai_context() reported oversized configs as "Best Config So Far" which
   led Claude to chase more oversized designs — now labels IN-BAND vs OUT-OF-BAND
   and warns when no in-band configs exist

Also strengthened AI system prompt: MW band is now labeled HARD CONSTRAINT with
explicit guidance on how to reduce power output (widen pinches).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Gallery edit fix, community lightbox redesign, nav map button

- Fix gallery edit Properties bug: pass itemId to getEditDropdownHtml
- Redesign community gallery lightbox to vertical layout (media top,
  info bar bottom) matching regular gallery pattern, with expandable
  comments panel toggle
- Add dedicated Navigate button to side menu for Station Map access,
  with quick-links visually subordinate below a divider

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: complete indexing, retrieval, and consolidation pipelines

Indexing:
- Batch entity embeddings via TELUS AI (nvidia/nv-embedqa-e5-v5)
- --embed-missing flag for backfilling existing entities
- Resilient JSON parsing (raw_decode, regex extraction)
- Improved extraction prompt (skip placeholder values)

Retrieval:
- Python-side PPR with proper out-degree normalization
- Convergence checking and score normalization (sum=1)
- Embedding-based seed finding via cosine similarity
- Retrieval logging for consolidation strengthening

Consolidation:
- Strengthen: access-log-driven edge weight boosting
- Decay: Ebbinghaus forgetting curve (configurable halflife)
- Prune: weak edge removal with audit logging, orphan cleanup
- Schema: relation normalization, duplicate entity detection
- --stats: graph health dashboard

Commands:
- /index, /recall, /consolidate now invoke Python scripts directly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 'Prikaži na grafu' — load entity neighborhood instead of highlighting in global graph

Previously only set highlightIds in the global suspicious graph, where the
alerted entity might not even exist.

Now: pick primary entity from alert (company_mb → institution_id → person_id →
contract_id), fetch its /graph/neighborhood at depth=2, load that subgraph,
then highlight all alert-related IDs within it.

commit.message:
Add per-iteration mismatch logging to solver output

Compute NR residuals from internal PYPOWER data (V, Ybus, Sbus) and
include them in every run_power_flow result: iteration count, max P/Q
mismatch, worst bus, and convergence quality classification. Diverged
cases now show exactly how far from convergence they are.

Diagnostic mode restructured to use fresh deep-copies with increasing
iteration counts, producing a reliable mismatch trajectory the agent
can use to distinguish CONVERGING/DIVERGING/OSCILLATING behavior.

Also adds tolerance_mva to SolverSettings in result.py.

commit.message:
feat: full portfolio redesign (v2)

Bold/modern dark redesign with violet/indigo accent system, Lucide icons,
staggered scroll animations, and a suite of accessibility and bug fixes.

Changes:
- New design system in global.css: tokens, .card-hover glow, .btn-primary,
  .focus-ring, .text-gradient, .section-heading accent bar, .reveal stagger
- Header: sticky backdrop-blur, full-bleed (slot moved outside max-w container),
  mobile menu closes on link click
- Hero: gradient name, animated SVG bar chart visual, sequential reveals
- Skills: 6 cards with Lucide icons (Code, Database, ChartBar, TrendingUp, etc.)
- Projects: violet/indigo accent-bar cards, descriptive sr-only link text
- Contact: Lucide icon grid replacing emoji links; resume href fixed
- Footer: Lucide icon social links
- Add src/pages/projects/[...slug].astro (was in wrong dir, not a valid route)
- Remove dead files: ThemeToggle.astro, Layout.astro, src/projects/[...slug].astro
- Fix placeholder GitHub URLs in project content files
- Add @lucide/astro dependency

Bug fixes: resume link missing leading slash, text-gray-600 contrast fail,
hover:shadow-x1 typo, colorless focus rings, hover:bg-blue-50 on dark bg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ForceGraph: cleaner, less chaotic visualization

- Remove edge text labels (biggest source of clutter)
- Edge color legend in bottom-left corner per relationship type
- Node radius scales with connection degree (hubs are bigger)
- Stronger repulsion (-600 base, more for high-degree nodes)
- Variable link distance (contracts sit closer, entities further)
- Outer dashed ring on flagged/highlighted nodes

commit.message:
Mobile globe: skip 3D entirely, use animated CSS fallback

3D WebGL globe was rendering blank on mobile devices even though WebGL
was technically available. Now detects mobile (width <= 768 or touch +
width < 1024) and goes straight to animated fallback: spinning earth
image with CSS 3D rotateY perspective, inset shadow for depth, pulsing
cyan glow ring. Also improved fallback for retry exhaustion (20 attempts).

commit.message:
Fix country news false positives: relevance filter + better queries

Jordan feed was returning Michael Jordan, Jordan shoes, NFL Jordan players
instead of country news. Two fixes:

1. Better Google News queries: Jordan now searches "Jordanian" OR "King
   Abdullah" OR "Amman Jordan" instead of generic "Jordan news". Added
   Georgia country disambiguation too.

2. Server-side relevance filter: _filter_country_relevance() with
   false-positive patterns (50+ for Jordan, Turkey, Georgia, Chile) and
   positive anchor terms. Headlines with anchors always kept, headlines
   matching false positives dropped.

Tested: Jordan feed went from 80% false positives to 100% relevant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Community Room hidden for residents due to snake_case/camelCase mismatch

TenantProvider stored raw snake_case Supabase columns (community_portal)
but getNavigationForRole() looked up camelCase keys (communityPortal), so
all non-core features were invisible to regular users. Also fixes empty
demo features, missing core permission DB seeds, and SQL tier defaults
diverging from JS TIER_FEATURES config.

commit.message:
feat(cli): add cron install/show/uninstall commands

Adds obsidian-agent cron {install,show,uninstall} to manage scheduled
cron entries automatically from config. Managed entries are bracketed
with BEGIN/END markers so reinstalling replaces rather than appends.

Generated schedule:
- Structural index (indexing.schedule, default 03:00 daily)
- Semantic index (indexing.semantic_schedule, default 03:05 daily)
- Each enabled job at its configured schedule, preceded by index &&

Also adds IndexingConfig to config (schedule + semantic_schedule fields),
adds indexing section to config.yaml.example, and fixes LocalEmbedder
to force CPU to avoid CUDA capability mismatch on older GPUs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The old webpack config referenced compression-webpack-plugin which
is not installed, causing Vercel build failures.

fix: WhatsApp page blank - realUsers was undefined, replaced with MOCK_USERS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(core): remove double-counted home advantage from Poisson xG formula

Stats are venue-split (home_goals_at_home, away_conceded_away) so home
advantage is already embedded in the data. Applying HA factor again
caused model to predict home_win 89% of the time (actual: 42%) with
avg model_home_prob=62.7% vs reality=42.3%. This produced a 48.6% hit
rate and massive draw underestimation (19.1% model vs 29% actual).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Tier 4 — funnel analysis, scroll depth tracking, server-side event API (#14)

- Funnel analysis: define multi-step conversion funnels (page or event
  steps), computes per-step visitor counts and drop-off rates from raw
  pageview/event data. CRUD via /api/funnels, new Funnels dashboard tab
  with visual step bars and drop-off percentages.
- Scroll depth tracking: tracker fires scroll events at 25/50/75/100%
  thresholds (throttled, per-page deduped), stored as custom events.
- Server-side event API: POST /api/ingest accepts events with API key
  auth (key generated on site creation, shown in manage panel with copy
  button). Supports user_id for stable visitor hashing from backend.
- CloudFront behaviors for /api/funnels and /api/ingest.
- 49 tests passing (5 new: server-side event, bad API key, funnel CRUD
  with conversion analysis, site API key generation, API key in list).
